subject: fix(mobile-web): bottom sheet touch, burger menu position, PWA install visibility
body:
Three mobile web fixes:

1. Bottom sheet inaccessible: Added touch-action:none to drag handle so
   mobile browsers don't intercept swipes as page scroll. Fixed content
   PanResponder that captured ALL vertical drags when sheet wasn't full —
   now only captures drag-down at scroll top (collapse) or drag-up when
   not full (expand), allowing FlatList scrolling at all sheet positions.

2. Burger menu on left: RN Web Modal doesn't reliably support position:fixed
   backdrop + position:absolute child on mobile browsers. Switched to flexbox
   alignment (alignItems:flex-end + marginRight) so menu anchors to the right
   edge regardless of Modal container width.

3. PWA install banner invisible: Was floating at bottom:190 over the map where
   it's easily missed or hidden behind the bottom sheet. Moved inside the
   bottom sheet content so it's visible when users interact with the station
   list. Increased auto-hide from 10s to 30s for slower mobile interactions.

Tags: mobile-web, bottom-sheet, burger-menu, pwa, ui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
